leadText: Simple Beam (Japanese: シンプルビーム Simple Beam) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Simple Beam changes the target's Ability to Simple . If a Pokémon affected by Simple Beam is switched out, it regains its original Ability. Simple Beam fails if the target's Ability is Simple, Truant , Multitype , Zen Mode ( Generation VII onward), Stance Change , Schooling , Comatose , Shields Down , Disguise , RKS System , Battle Bond , Power Construct , Ice Face , Gulp Missile , or As One . With Simple as its Ability, if the Pokémon's stat stages would be increased or decreased, the amount they would change by is doubled. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Simple Beam, the user's Special Attack stat rises one stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user's mysterious psychic wave changes the target's Ability to Simple. S V The user emits a mysterious psychic wave that changes the target's Ability to Simple.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It changes the target's Ability to Simple. S MD It changes the target's Ability to Simple. The target regains its usual Ability when it goes to the next floor or faints.
